article.shareMessage: Read more in Arab Tourism Magazine
article.defaultAuthorBio: Editor-in-Chief of Arab Tourism Magazine, expert in tourism media and development. The magazine is the first Saudi publication specializing in the tourism sector, aiming to highlight Arab treasures and global tourist attractions.

saved.title: Saved Articles
saved.empty: You have no saved articles. Start exploring inspiring stories!

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your username or email. If an account exists, we will send reset instructions.

about.visionContent: Arab Tourism Magazine takes pride in being the first Saudi magazine specializing in tourism. We aim to highlight Arab treasures and global tourist attractions with a modern vision that keeps pace with the significant developments in the tourism sector in Saudi Arabia and the region.

achievements.oscarsDesc: The highest international awards in tourism media.
achievements.licensedDesc: Saudi General Authority for Media License: 160495.
achievements.leadershipDesc: The first Saudi publication specialized in the tourism sector.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to answer your inquiries
contact.workingHours:
Working Hours: Sunday - Thursday
9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

intro.slide1Desc: Discover the most luxurious destinations and heritage sites across the Arab world.
intro.slide2Desc: Get deep insights into the tourism industry with our award-winning journalism.
intro.slide3Desc: Real-time news and updates from the pulse of Arab culture and tourism.

cultural.title: Pulse of Arabic Culture
cultural.description: Culture is not just destinations, but the soul that inhabits every corner. Dive into the depths of art, calligraphy, and traditions passed down for millennia.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introContent: Arab Tourism Magazine is concerned with the tourism heritage of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia to keep pace with the global trends pursued by the Kingdom.
privacy.dataContent: The magazine's data is available to government agencies or other related departments in order to better serve you. This data may also be available to authorized non-governmental organizations.
privacy.disclaimerContent: The magazine is not responsible for any direct or indirect damages that may result from the use of the site or reliance on the information contained therein.
privacy.updatesContent: This policy was last updated on August 26, 2025. Current Version: 1.0.
